products.name: Super Hydrating Serum
products.descr: Achieve your most hydrated skin yet. Our Super Hydrating Serum is powered by 10% 4D hyaluronic acid: that’s 4 molecular weights of hyaluronic acid for both surface and deep…
products.long_desc: Achieve your most hydrated skin yet. Our Super Hydrating Serum is powered by 10% 4D hyaluronic acid: that’s 4 molecular weights of hyaluronic acid for both surface and deep, sustained hydration. With anti-aging peptides, honey, and pro-vitamin B5 to support the skin barrier. Visible results from first use. Hydrate Plump Calm Support
products.how_to_use: To be used twice per day on damp skin. Apply up to 3 pumps to the face and neck. Spread the serum evenly and massage it until fully absorbed. Can be layered with all other Beesline serums.
products.ingredients: 4D Hyaluronic Acid 4 molecular weights of hyaluronic acid for both surface and deep hydration, and a plumper, smoother complexion. Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer (largest molecule) sits at the outer layer of the skin and protects it. Sodium Hyaluronate retains water on the surface of the skin. Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate binds to the keratin layer, providing superior hydration and repairing it. Hydrolyzed Sodium Hyaluronate penetrates deep into the epidermis and dermis, hydrating and restoring the skin internally. Peptides reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Honey (Mel) is a natural humectant that attracts and retains moisture in the skin. It nourishes and hydrates, leaving the skin soft and supple. Pro-vitamin B5 (Panthenol) is a hydrating and soothing ingredient that locks in moisture and boosts skin elasticity. It also supports the skin barrier, keeping it healthy and protected. Aloe Vera (Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice) is a soothing ingredient that calms and hydrates the skin
products.benefits: • Supercharged serum with 10% 4D hyaluronic acid for multi-level hydration • Anti-aging peptides for visibly plumper skin • Visibly plumper skin from the first application
